# Qadiya OS
> Qadiya OS is a bilingual (Arabic RTL + English) AI-powered legal practice management suite for Kuwait law firms. It combines AI-drafted case reports, deadline intelligence, court calendaring, billing, trust accounting, document drafting, conflict-of-interest checking, and a client portal — powered by live Kuwait Ministry of Justice data.

Qadiya OS is a private, staff-facing app. Most surfaces (dashboard, cases, billing, tasks, documents, AI assistant) require sign-in and are not indexable. The pages below are the only public entry points.

## Pages
- [Homepage](/): Marketing landing page with features, pricing, and FAQ.
- [Client Portal](/portal): Clients look up their Kuwait legal case by number to see status, next hearing, judgments, and shared documents.
- [Sign in](/login): Staff sign-in for lawyers, partners, associates, and paralegals.
- [Help](/help): Support and documentation.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
